creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
Yes, I approve of the patch.

On Thu, 14 Feb 2008 11:40:09 UT Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/py-beautifulsoup,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/120639 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120639
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
